ListInstance.Title: IT_Assets
ListInstance.Description: IT Asset Lifecycle Management – primary asset registry

ListInstance.Title: Asset_History
ListInstance.Description: Audit trail for all asset status and assignment changes

ListInstance.Title: Asset_Assignments
ListInstance.Description: Assignment records — who has each asset, maintenance schedule

ListInstance.Title: Asset_Repairs
ListInstance.Description: Repair history entries for each asset

ListInstance.Title: AssetAttachments
ListInstance.Description: Asset lifecycle document attachments organised by AssetID/subfolder
